string.text:
WARNING: UNSTABLE GAME STATE
 
A critical Lua error has occurred resulting in script engine corruption, ie. "Busy Hands" state.
Your game has been saved to "tempsave" file. It is recommended to return to the Main Menu or reload the save immediately.
Continuing from this point will result in further corruption and potentially crash the game.
 
Script: %s
 
The error has been logged with [BusyHandsDebug] message.
Send the log and report the issue to relevant Script Author or Mod Pack.
